_publications._publicationTitle: Stem-like cells drive NF1-associated MPNST functional heterogeneity and tumor progression.

_contextSnippet: All drug-treated mice exhibited varying degrees of tumor inhibition as compared to the saline group. However, the Doxo+DT group exhibited the greatest tumor volume inhibition
details: Doxo+DT group exhibited the greatest tumor volume inhibition compared to other treatment groups
